title: Surface (v2)
description: A surface: a curated, annotated set of items presented for a reason at a moment. Core schema; profiles layer further constraints (see schemas/profiles/). Documentation: docs/surface.md.

context.description: Open, profile-defined block. The core schema places no constraints on it; the active profile defines and validates its fields.

category.description: Renderer placement. Documented values: default, standing, showcase, archive. Open to others; unknown values render as showcase.

type.description: Genre of the item, independent of where it lives. Documented values: note, story, file, directory, repo, link, compare. Open to app-defined types (e.g. the surfacer's generated feeds). Renderers show unknown types as a generic card; they never drop them.

format.description: Content-format hint for inline or fetched content (e.g. markdown, json, text).

role.description: Semantic role of the item within the surface. Absent means the item claims no role. Profiles may require it and constrain its values.

content.description: Inline body carried by the item itself (a note or story). Interpreted per `format`.

summary.description: Condensation of the item (what it says, shorter).

commentary.description: Interpretation of or comment on the item (what the curator thinks about it). Distinct from summary.

facet.description: Renderer-visible grouping key; produces section headers.

source.description: Where the targeted resource lives. Repository sources use the structured {repository, ref, path} form; external resources use uri; a path with no repository is local to the environment rendering the surface. See docs/surface.md for the full convention.

repository.description: owner/repo. Always explicit for repository sources; never inferred from context.

ref.description: Symbolic ref (branch or tag). Optional; absent means the repository's default branch.

revision.description: Resolved commit id pinning the ref at capture time.

uri.description: Canonical external URI, for resources that already have one.

patch.description: Unified diff for this item, when the surface carries the patch inline rather than by reference.

reason.description: Why this representation was chosen. Distinct from commentary (about the item) and summary (of the item).

item.description: The id of another item in this surface.
